title: HLX-316: GitHub self-update and auto-update for helix-cli
description: Walkthrough of the self-update mechanism added to helix-cli: config system fix, version reader, GitHub SHA check, self-update execution, update orchestration, and CLI wiring.

steps.title: Extended config types
steps.description: Added InstallSource type (mode, repo, branch, commit) and extended HxConfig with optional autoUpdate and installSource fields. These support persisting update eligibility metadata in ~/.hlx/config.json.

steps.title: New loadFullConfig helper
steps.description: Reads the full raw config from disk including optional update fields. Used by the update module to read autoUpdate and installSource without the env-var override logic of loadConfig.

steps.title: Read-merge-write saveConfig
steps.description: Changed saveConfig to accept Partial<HxConfig> and use a read-merge-write pattern. Reads existing config, merges with updates via spread, writes back. This fixes the lossy-save bug where login would destroy autoUpdate/installSource fields.

steps.title: Package version reader
steps.description: Reads version from package.json at runtime using fileURLToPath(import.meta.url) for ES module path resolution. At runtime, the compiled file lives at dist/update/version.js, so package.json is ../../package.json relative to it.

steps.title: GitHub SHA check via git ls-remote
steps.description: fetchRemoteSha() runs git ls-remote against the canonical repo URL with a 10-second timeout. Parses the 40-char hex SHA from stdout. Returns null on any failure (git not found, network error, parse error) - never throws.

steps.title: Self-update via npm install -g from GitHub
steps.description: performUpdate() runs npm install -g github:Project-X-Innovation/helix-cli#main with a 120-second timeout. Sets HLX_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 in the subprocess env to prevent recursive update checks. Supports quiet mode for auto-update vs verbose for explicit hlx update.

steps.title: Update command handler (hlx update)
steps.description: runUpdate() handles --enable-auto/--disable-auto flags for toggling autoUpdate. Without flags, it checks the remote SHA, compares with local installSource.commit, and runs performUpdate if behind. Persists installSource metadata on success.

steps.title: Auto-update pre-command check
steps.description: checkAutoUpdate() runs before command dispatch. Guards: HLX_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK env var (loop prevention), autoUpdate must be true, installSource must match canonical source. Network failures silently skip - never blocks command execution.

steps.title: SKIP_AUTO_UPDATE set
steps.description: Commands that bypass the auto-update check: --version, -v, update, --help, -h. These execute immediately without update overhead.

steps.title: Auto-update hook wired before dispatch
steps.description: checkAutoUpdate() is called before the switch dispatcher for all commands not in the skip set. This ensures every normal CLI invocation checks for updates when autoUpdate is enabled.

steps.title: Fixed version output
steps.description: Replaced hardcoded console.log('0.1.0') with getPackageVersion() which reads the actual version from package.json at runtime. Now correctly outputs '1.2.0'.

steps.title: Added prepare script
steps.description: Added 'prepare': 'npm run build' so that git-based npm install (npm install -g github:...) compiles TypeScript before packing. Without this, dist/ would not exist since it's gitignored.
